zh.lifeSummary: 當Ammeline de Baladon於1038年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉時，她的父親Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy18歲，母親Emma du Bois-l'Évêque16歲。她和Ernulf de Hesdin至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1094年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ammeline de Baladon于1038年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉时，她的父亲Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy18岁，母亲Emma du Bois-l'Évêque16岁。她和Ernulf de Hesdin至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1094年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baladon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Balstone in Buckland Monachorum or Bulstone in Branscombe (both in Devon) or Great Boulsdon in Newent (Gloucestershire). These placenames are of uncertain origin.

possibly a habitational name from Bowsden in Lowick (Northumberland), which is recorded as Bollisdon in 1250. This placename is most probably from the personal name Boll in the genitive case with -es + denu ‘(long, narrow) valley’, later replaced by dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Ammeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

en.lifeSummary: When Ammeline de Baladon was born in 1038, in Falaise, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy, was 18 and her mother, Emma du Bois-l'Évêque, was 16. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ernulf de Hesdin. She died in 1094, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ammeline de Baladon est née en 1038, à Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Emma du Bois-l'Évêque, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ernulf de Hesdin. Elle est décédée en 1094, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ammeline de Baladon 1038 in Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy 18 und ihre Mutter Emma du Bois-l'Évêque 16. Sie hatte mit Ernulf de Hesdin mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1094 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ammeline de Baladon è nata il nel 1038 nel Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Emma du Bois-l'Évêque, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ernulf de Hesdin. Morì nel 1094, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ammeline de Baladonが1038年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassyは18歳，母Emma du Bois-l'Évêqueは16歳であった。彼女はErnulf de Hesdinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1094年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ammeline de Baladon(이)가 1038년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma du Bois-l'Évêque(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Ernulf de Hesdin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1094년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ammeline de Baladon nasceu em 1038, em Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Emma du Bois-l'Évêque, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Ernulf de Hesdin. Ela faleceu em 1094, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ammeline de Baladon родилась в 1038 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma du Bois-l'Évêque, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ernulf de Hesdin. Она умерла в 1094 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

sm.from 1059 to 1060: mai le 1059 e o'o I le 1060

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ammeline de Baladon nació en 1038, en Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lacy Lord of Lassy, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Emma du Bois-l'Évêque, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Ernulf de Hesdin. Murió en 1094, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
